text.message: I'm taking 2/9/10. what do you want blue?

Think about my most advantageous spot
well if I build road left and you plow me
I left you more ore for garenteed ows army
and double city on 4 and 10 ore?
Yeah now I wish I plowed you black
Guilt tripping me in the chat
Once you get the wood port you’re set up really well
but I guess I'm the target for oj targeting you.
man elo resets really are the worst
lol ok you’re not the target covering the wood was just a good move in general
the wood block has been hurting
robbing me instead of oj totally makes sense then... not like 5 or 8 rolls more than 10...
blue, you just keep targeting me for oj plowing you and he will take you brick port and then I guess you'll both be happy
can't do anything with these 8 cards
only option is to 7 out again
Friedman moved Robber Robber robber to prob_5 lumber tile
